display_name: MiMo V2 Flash is Xiaomi's lightweight, high-speed reasoning model designed for fast and cost-effective text generation. It uses a hybrid attention architecture and multi-token prediction to keep infer
description:
MiMo V2 Flash is Xiaomi's lightweight, high-speed reasoning model designed for fast and cost-effective text generation. It uses a hybrid attention architecture and multi-token prediction to keep inference costs low while maintaining strong performance on complex reasoning benchmarks.

Notes:
Context Window: 256K
Max Output: 64K

This bot supports optional parameters for additional customization.
